title: Hercules Against the Mongols
writer: Alessandro Ferraù, Luciano Martino, Domenico Paolella
actors: Mark Forest, José Greci, Maria Grazia Spina
plot: Though Genghis Khan eventually sought peace with the West, his death in 1227 AD puts into power his three war-like sons: Sayan, Susdal, and Kin Khan. These sons quickly overrun the city of Tuleda and take prisoner Princess Bianca,...
